tools.name: get_ai_papers
tools.description: Get trending or searched AI/ML research papers from HuggingFace Papers. Returns trending papers for a given date or search results by keyword.

tools.name: search_arxiv_ai
tools.description: Search arXiv for AI/ML papers by keyword and category. Returns recent submissions sorted by date.

tools.name: search_dblp
tools.description: Search DBLP computer science bibliography for publications or authors. Free, no key required.
